plugins.name: product-audit
plugins.description: Product audit suite: product-map, screen-map, use-case, feature-gap, feature-prune, seed-forge. 产品审计套件：功能地图、界面地图、用例集、功能查漏、功能剪枝、种子数据锻造。

plugins.name: deadhunt
plugins.description: Validate web products: find dead links, hunt ghost features, verify CRUD completeness, check field consistency. 猎杀死链，验证产品完整性，检查字段一致性。

plugins.name: code-tuner
plugins.description: Code architecture tuner: compliance check, duplication detection, abstraction analysis. 代码架构调优：规范检查、重复检测、抽象分析。
